# Gemora Tech (formerly Dexterous Softech)

> Gemora Tech is the global technology division of Gemora Global Private Limited, delivering enterprise custom software development, AI/ML solutions, web & mobile apps, SaaS product engineering, blockchain/Web3, and game development for international clients (USA, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE, and more). Founded in 2015 as Dexterous Softech, rebranded to Gemora Tech in 2023, with 10+ years of industry experience and 100+ projects delivered globally.

- Full LLM Knowledge Base: [llms-full.txt](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/llms-full.txt)
- Engagement models: Time & Materials ($25–$45/hr), Fixed Price Sprints, and Dedicated Squads ($3.2k–$5.5k/month).
- Market presence: USA (New York), UK (London), UAE (Dubai), India (Jaipur delivery center).

## Glossary

Technical term definitions:
- [Continuous Deployment](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/glossary/continuous-deployment)
- [Continuous Integration](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/glossary/continuous-integration)
- [Microservices](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/glossary/microservices)
- [RESTful API](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/glossary/restful-api)
- [GraphQL](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/glossary/graphql)
- [Serverless Architecture](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/glossary/serverless-architecture)
- [Docker Container](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/glossary/docker-container)
- [Kubernetes Cluster](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/glossary/kubernetes-cluster)

## Location Landing Pages

The site publishes verified local SEO landing pages at `/services/{city}` for top international tech hubs (e.g. [New York](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/services/new-york), [London](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/services/london), [Dubai](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/services/dubai), [Bangalore](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/services/bangalore), [Singapore](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/services/singapore), [Sydney](https://www.dexteroussoftech.com/services/sydney)).
